_reviews;\n+\n+    public BookCatalogService()\n+    {\n+        (_authors, _publishers, _genres, _users, _books, _bookGenres, _reviews) = SeedData();\n+    }\n+\n+    public async Task<BookDashboardViewModel> GetDashboardAsync()\n+    {\n+        await Task.Delay(120);\n+\n+        var topBooks = _books\n+            .Select(BuildBookCard)\n+            .OrderByDescending(book => book.AverageRating)\n+            .ThenByDescending(book => book.ReviewCount)\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var recentReviews = _reviews\n+            .OrderByDescending(review => review.ReviewedAt)\n+            .Take(5)\n+            .Select(review => new ReviewCardViewModel\n+            {\n+                BookTitle = review.Book.Title,\n+                ReviewerName = review.User.FullName,\n+                Score = review.Score,\n+                Sentiment = review.Sentiment,\n+                Comment = review.Comment,\n+                ReviewedAt = review.ReviewedAt\n+            })\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var genreStats = _genres\n+            .Select(genre => new GenreStatViewModel\n+            {\n+                GenreName = genre.Name,\n+                BookCount = _bookGenres.Count(bookGenre => bookGenre.GenreId == genre.Id),\n+                AverageRating = CalculateGenreAverageRating(genre.Id)\n+            })\n+            .OrderByDescending(stat => stat.AverageRating)\n+            .ThenByDescending(stat => stat.BookCount)\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        return new BookDashboardViewModel\n+        {\n+            TotalBooks = _books.Count,\n+            TotalAuthors = _authors.Count,\n+            TotalUsers = _users.Count,\n+            OverallAverageRating = CalculateOverallAverageRating(),\n+            TopBooks = topBooks.Take(3).ToList(),\n+            RecentReviews = recentReviews,\n+            GenreStats = genreStats\n+        };\n+    }\n+\n+    private BookCardViewModel BuildBookCard(Book readonly CatalogDbContext _context;\n\n    public BookCatalogService(CatalogDbContext context)\n    {\n        _context = context;\n    }\n\n    public async Task<BookDashboardViewModel> GetDashboardAsync()\n    {\n        var books = await _context.Books\n            .Include(b => b.Author)\n            .Include(b => b.Publisher)\n            .Include(b => b.BookGenres)\n            .ThenInclude(bg => bg.Genre)\n            .Include(b => b.Reviews)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        var genres = await _context.Genres\n            .Include(g => g.BookGenres)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        var reviews = await _context.Reviews\n            .Include(r => r.Book)\n            .Include(r => r.User)\n            .OrderByDescending(review => review.ReviewedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        var topBooks = books\n            .Select(BuildBookCard)\n            .OrderByDescending(book => book.AverageRating)\n            .ThenByDescending(book => book.ReviewCount)\n            .ToList();\n\n        var recentReviews = reviews\n            .Take(5)\n            .Select(review => new ReviewCardViewModel\n            {\n                BookTitle = review.Book.Title,\n                ReviewerName = review.User.FullName,\n                Score = review.Score,\n                Sentiment = review.Sentiment,\n                Comment = review.Comment,\n                ReviewedAt = review.ReviewedAt\n            })\n            .ToList();\n\n        var genreStats = genres\n            .Select(genre => new GenreStatViewModel\n            {\n                GenreName = genre.Name,\n                BookCount = genre.BookGenres.Count,\n                AverageRating = CalculateGenreAverageRating(genre.Id, books, reviews)\n            })\n            .OrderByDescending(stat => stat.AverageRating)\n            .ThenByDescending(stat => stat.BookCount)\n            .ToList();\n\n        var dashboard = new BookDashboardViewModel\n        {\n            TotalBooks = books.Count,\n            TotalAuthors = await _context.Authors.CountAsync(),\n            TotalUsers = await _context.Users.CountAsync(),\n            OverallAverageRating = CalculateOverallAverageRating(reviews),\n            TopBooks = topBooks.Take(3).ToList(),\n            RecentReviews = recentReviews,\n            GenreStats = genreStats\n        };\n\n        return dashboard;\n    }\n\n    private static BookCardViewModel BuildBookCard(Book book)\n    {\n        var reviewCount = book.Reviews.Count;\n        var averageRating = reviewCount == 0 ? 0 : book.Reviews.Average(review => review.Score);\n\n        return new BookCardViewModel\n        {\n            Id = book.Id,\n            Title = book.Title,\n            AuthorName = $\"{book.Author.FirstName} {book.Author.LastName}\",\n            PublisherName = book.Publisher.Name,\n            Genres = string.Join(\", \", book.BookGenres.Select(bookGenre => bookGenre.Genre.Name)),\n            Status = book.Status,\n            PublishedOn = book.PublishedOn,\n            AverageRating = averageRating,\n            ReviewCount = reviewCount\n        };\n    }\n\n    private static double CalculateOverallAverageRating(IReadOnlyList<Review> reviews)\n    {\n        return reviews.Count == 0 ? 0 : reviews.Average(review => review.Score);\n    }\n\n    private static double CalculateGenreAverageRating(int genreId, IReadOnlyList<Book> books, IReadOnlyList<Review> reviews)\n    {\n        var genreBookIds = books\n            .Where(book => book.BookGenres.Any(bookGenre => bookGenre.GenreId == genreId))\n            .Select(book => book.Id)\n            .ToHashSet();\n\n        var genreRatings = reviews\n            .Where(review => genreBookIds.Contains(review.BookId))\n            .Select(review => review.Score)\n            .ToList();\n\n        return genreRatings.Count == 0 ? 0 : genreRatings.Average();\n **Semanti”Åki URL-i** - Vi+Ēe ispravnih URL-a za istu akciju (npr. `/books/1` i `/books/detalji/1`)\n\n## Route Constraints\n\n- `{id:int}` - ID mora biti cijeli broj\n\n## Redoslijed skeniranja ruta\n\n1. Attribute routes se procesiraju prvi\n2. Ako attribute route odgovara, koristi se\n3. implementaciji\n\n### Lazy Loading\nVirtual svojstva omogu”ńavaju lazy loading:\n```csharp\nvar author = await _authorRepository.GetByIdAsync(1);\nvar bookCount = author.Books.Count; // Automatski se u”Åitavaju knjige\n```\n\n### Eager Loading\nRepozitoriji koriste `Include()` za eager loading:\n```csharp\nvar book = await _context.Books\n    .Include(b => b.Author)\n    .Include(b => b.Reviews)\n    .FirstOrDefaultAsync();\n```\n\n### N+1 Problem\nRije+Ēen s `Include()` i `ThenInclude()`:\n```csharp\nvar books = await _context.Books\n    .Include(b => b.BookGenres)\n    .ThenInclude(bg => bg.Genre)\n    .ToListAsync();\n```\n\n---\n\n## Baza podataka - Inicijalni podaci\n\nBaza je automatic popunjena s:\n\n**Autori** (3)\n- J.K. Pokretanje migracija (uvijek iz lab-3 direktorija)\n\n```powershell\ncd c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-3\n\n# Kreiraj novu migraciju s opisnim nazivom\ndotnet ef migrations add AddNewFeature\n\n# Primjeni migraciju na bazu\ndotnet ef database update\n\n# Prika+┐i listu svih migracija\ndotnet ef migrations list\n```\n\n### 2. Uklju”Åivanje podataka pri konfiguraciji (DbContext.OnModelCreating)\n\n```csharp\nprotected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)\n{\n    base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);\n\n    // Seeding podataka\n    modelBuilder.Entity<Author>().HasData(\n        new Author { Id = 1, FirstName = \"Stephen\", LastName = \"King\", ... }\n    );\n}\n```\n\n### 3. Konfiguracija relationship-a\n\n```csharp\n// 1-N veza (jedan autor, mnogu knjiga)\nmodelBuilder.Entity<Book>()\n    .HasOne(b => b.Author)\n    .WithMany(a => a.Books)\n    .HasForeignKey(b => b.AuthorId);\n\n// N-N veza (mnogo knjiga, mnogo +┐anrova)\nmodelBuilder.Entity<BookGenre>()\n    .HasKey(bg => new { bg.BookId, bg.GenreId });\n```\n\n---\n\n## Korak-po-korak: Dodavanje novog entiteta\n\n### Korak 1: Kreiraj modelsku klasu\n\n```csharp\n// Models/Award.cs\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;\n\nnamespace Lab3.Models;\n\npublic class Award\n{\n    [Key]\n    public int Id { get; set; }\n\n    public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n    public string Description { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n    public DateTime AwardedOn { get; set; }\n\n    // Foreign key\n    [ForeignKey(nameof(Book))]\n    public int BookId { get; set; }\n\n    public virtual Book Book { get; set; } = default!;\n}\n```\n\n### Korak 2: Dodaj DbSet u DbContext\n\n```csharp\n// Data/CatalogDbContext.cs\npublic DbSet<Award> Awards { get; set; }\n```\n\n### Korak 3: A+┐uriraj model relationships (ako je potrebno)\n\n```csharp\n// Models/Book.cs\npublic virtual ICollection<Award> Awards { get; set; } = new List<Award>();\n```\n\n### Korak 4: Konfiguriraj relationships u DbContext.OnModelCreating\n\n```csharp\nmodelBuilder.Entity<Award>()\n    .HasOne(a => a.Book)\n    .WithMany(b => b.Awards)\n    .HasForeignKey(a => a.BookId)\n    .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n```\n\n### Korak 5: Kreiraj migraciju\n\n```powershell\ndotnet ef migrations add AddAwardEntity\n```\n\n### Korak 6: Primjeni migraciju\n\n```powershell\ndotnet ef database update\n```\n\n---\n\n## Korak-po-korak: Dodavanje novog polja na postoje”ńi entitet\n\n### Korak 1: Dodaj svojstvo u modelsku klasu\n\n```csharp\n// Models/Book.cs\npublic class Book\n{\n    // ...\n    public string Genre { get; set; } = string.Empty;  // Novo polje\n}\n```\n\n### Korak 2: Kreiraj migraciju (EF ”ńe automatski detektirati promjenu)\n\n```powershell\ndotnet ef migrations add AddGenreFieldToBook\n```\n\n### Korak 3: Pregledaj migracijsku datoteku\n\n```powershell\n# Migracija ”ńe biti u Migrations/ foldera\n# Trebao bi viditi AddColumn komandu za novo polje\n```\n\n### Korak 4: Primjeni migraciju\n\n```powershell\ndotnet ef database update\n```\n\n---\n\n## ”Ņesto postavljana pitanja (FAQ)\n\n### P: Kako resetiram bazu?\n\n```powershell\n# Obri+Ēi bazu datoteke\nRemove-Item catalog.db\n\n# Primjeni sve migracije ispo”Åetka\ndotnet ef database update\n```\n\n### P: Kako vidim SQL skripte koje EF generira?\n\n```powershell\n# Izvezi migracije kao SQL script\ndotnet ef migrations script\n```\n\n### P: +ßto ako migracija ne uspije primjenjivanja na bazu?\n\n```powershell\n# Ukloni zadnju migraciju (ako je neuspje+Ēna)\ndotnet ef migrations remove\n\n# Ili resetiraj bazu i kreni ispo”Åetka\nRemove-Item catalog.db\ndotnet ef database update\n```\n\n---\n\n## Best Practices\n\nįØ¶ **Koristite async-await** pri pozivu baze u kontrolerima\nįØ¶ **Koristi Include()** pri u”Åitavanju povezanih entiteta\n```csharp\nvar book = await _context.Books\n    .Include(b => b.Author)\n    .Include(b => b.Reviews)\n \"Rad s List stranicama - Index view za prikaz kolekcija entiteta\"\napplyTo:\n  - \"**/Views/**/*.cshtml\"\n  - \"**/Controllers/*Controller.cs\"\n---\n\n# List Stranice (Index View) - Lab 3\n\nOvaj skill pru+┐ava smjernice za kreiranju i unaprje”┼enju Index (list) stranica za prikaz kolekcija podataka iz baze.\n\n## Kada koristiti ovaj skill\n\n- Trebate napraviti novu **Index view stranicu** za prikaz liste svih zapisa\n- Trebate **pobolj+Ēati postoje”ńu list stranicu** (dodati statistiku, search, filtering)\n- Trebate dodati **responsive dizajn** (tablica za desktop, kartice za mobile)\n- Trebate implementirati **empty state** (poruka kada nema podataka)\n\n## Va+┐ne karakteristike List stranica\n\nįØ∙ **Index akcija** u kontroleru koji vra”ńa sve zapise (async/await)\nįØ∙ **Model**: `IReadOnlyList<Entity>`\nįØ∙ **Breadcrumb navigacija** za bolje UX\nįØ∙ **Statistika** (broj zapisa, prosjeci, filtrirani rezultati)\nįØ∙ **Empty state** kada nema podataka\nįØ∙ **Responsive tablica** - table za desktop, kartice za mobile\nįØ∙ **Akcije** - linkovi na Details stranicu\nįØ∙ **Accessibility** - aria labels, semantic HTML\n\n## Korak-po-korak: Osnovna List stranica\n\n### Korak 1: Provjeri Controller Index akciju\n\n```csharp\n// Controllers/MyController.cs\n[Route(\"[controller]\")]\n[Route(\"ruta\")]\npublic class MyController : Controller\n{\n    private readonly IMyRepository _repository;\n\n    public MyController(IMyRepository repository)\n    {\n        _repository = repository;\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"\")]\n    [Route(\"index\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Index()\n    {\n        var items = await _repository.GetAllAsync();\n        return View(items);  // Vra”ńi listu\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### Korak 2: Kreiraj Index.cshtml u `Views/MyFolder/`\n\n```html\n@model IReadOnlyList<MyEntity>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Moji entiteti\";\n}\n\n<!-- Breadcrumb navigacija -->\n<nav aria-label=\"breadcrumb\" class=\"mb-3\">\n mogu”ńno+Ē”ńu detaljnog prikaza.</p>\n        </div>\n        <span class=\"panel-note\">@Model.Count zapisa</span>\n    </div>\n</section>\n\n<!-- Empty State (kada nema podataka) -->\n@if (!Model.Any())\n{\n    <section class=\"panel-card\" role=\"status\" aria-live=\"polite\">\n        <h3>Nema dostupnih entiteta</h3>\n        <p>Trenutno nema zapisa za prikaz.</p>\n        <a d-lg-block) -->\n    <section class=\"panel-card d-none d-lg-block\" aria-label=\"Tabli”Åni prikaz\">\n        <div class=\"table-responsive\">\n            <table class=\"table app-table\">\n                <thead>\n                    <tr>\n                        <th scope=\"col\">Naziv</th>\n                        <th scope=\"col\">Datum</th>\n                        <th aria-label=\"Karti”Åni prikaz\">\n        @foreach (var item in Model)\n        {\n            <article class=\"panel-card\">\n                <h3>@item.Name</h3>\n                <p><strong>Datum:</strong> @item.CreatedAt.ToString(\"dd.MM.yyyy.\")</p>\n                <a class=\"btn btn-primary\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@item.Id\">\n                    Detalji\n                </a>\n            </article>\n        }\n    </section>\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Korak-po-korak: Napredna List stranica sa Statistikom\n\n### Korak 1: Dodaj kalkulacije u view top\n\n```csharp\n@model IReadOnlyList<MyEntity>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Entiteti\";\n    \n    // Kalkulacije za statistiku\n    var totalCount = Model.Count;\n    var activeCount = Model.Count(x => x.Status == Status.Active);\n    var inactiveCount = totalCount - activeCount;\n    var averageRating = totalCount == 0 ? 0 : Model.Average(x => x.Rating);\n}\n```\n\n### Korak 2: Prika+┐i statistiku\n\n```html\n<section class=\"panel-card stats-hero mb-4\" aria-labelledby=\"stats-heading\">\n    <div class=\"panel-header\">\n        <div>\n            <p class=\"section-label\">Index</p>\n            <h2 id=\"stats-heading\">Katalog entiteta</h2>\n        </div>\n        <span class=\"panel-note\">@totalCount zapisa</span>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"stats-grid\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Sa+┐etak statistike\">\n        <article class=\"stat-card\" role=\"listitem\">\n            <span>Ukupno</span>\n            <strong>@totalCount</strong>\n        </article>\n        <article class=\"stat-card\" role=\"listitem\">\n            <span>Aktivnih</span>\n            <strong>@activeCount</strong>\n        </article>\n        <article class=\"stat-card\" role=\"listitem\">\n            <span>Neaktivnih</span>\n            <strong>@inactiveCount</strong>\n        </article>\n        <article class=\"stat-card\" role=\"listitem\">\n            <span>Prosje”Åna ocjena</span>\n            <strong>@averageRating.ToString(\"0.0\")</strong>\n        </article>\n    </div>\n</section>\n```\n\n---\n\n## Best Practices\n\nįØ¶ **Koristi `IReadOnlyList<T>`** - sprje”Åava slu”Åajne izmjene\nįØ¶ **Uvijek dodaj empty state** - korisnik zna +Ēto se doga”┼a\nįØ¶ **Responsive design** - `d-none d-lg-block` za tablice, `d-lg-none` za kartice\nįØ¶ **Breadcrumb navigacija** - bolje UX i SEO\nįØ¶ **Aria labels** - za accessibility\nįØ¶ **Include relacije** - koristi `.Include()` u kontroleru kako izbegne+Ē N+1 problema\nįØ¶ **Async/await** - uvijek koristi za database pozive\nįØ¶ **Link-ovi na Details** - `asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@item.Id\"`\n\n---\n\n## Primjer: Authors List stranica (kompletan)\n\n**Controllers/AuthorsController.cs**\n\n```csharp\n[Route(\"[controller]\")]\n[Route(\"autori\")]\npublic class AuthorsController : Controller\n{\n    private readonly IAuthorRepository _authorRepository;\n\n    public AuthorsController(IAuthorRepository authorRepository)\n    {\n        _authorRepository = authorRepository;\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"\")]\n    [Route(\"index\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Index()\n    {\n        var authors = await _authorRepository.GetAllAsync();\n        return View(authors);\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Route(\"profil/{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Details(int id)\n    {\n        var author = await _authorRepository.GetByIdAsync(id);\n        if (author is null)\n        {\n            return NotFound();\n        }\n\n        return View(author);\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Views/Authors/Index.cshtml**\n\n```html\n@model IReadOnlyList<Author>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Autori\";\n    var totalAuthors = Model.Count;\n    var totalBooks = Model.Sum(a Index(string nationality = \"all\")\n{\n    var authors = await _authorRepository.GetAllAsync();\n    \n    if (nationality != \"all\")\n    {\n        authors = authors.Where(a => a.Nationality == nationality).ToList();\n    }\n    \n    return View(authors);\n}\n```\n\n### P: Kako dodati search po imenu?\n\n```html\n<form asp-action=\"Index\" method=\"get\" class=\"search-form mb-4\">\n    <div class=\"input-group\">\n        <input type=\"text\" name=\"search\" placeholder=\"Pretra+┐i autore po imenu...\" \n               class=\"form-control\" value=\"@ViewData[\"search\"]\">\n        <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-primary\">Pretra+┐i</button>\n    </div>\n</form>\n```\n\n### P: +ßto ako je lista jako velika?\n\n- Implementiraj **pagination** (sve stranice, sljede”ńu, prethodnu)\n- Koristi `.Skip()` i `.Take()` u LINQ upitu\n- Prika+┐i samo potrebne entitete po stranici\n\n### P: Kako izbje”ńi N+1 problem?\n\n```csharp\n// ŁĶ▄¤ Lo+Ēe - N+1 problem (dohva”ńa autora, pa sve knjige za svakog)\nvar authors = await _authorRepository.GetAllAsync();\n@foreach (var author in Model)\n{\n    @author.Books.Count  // 1 upit po autoru!\n}\n\n// įØ∙ Dobro - Include u upitu\npublic async Task<IReadOnlyList<Author>> GetAllAsync()\n{\n    return await _dbContext.Authors\n        .Include(a => a.Books)  // U”Åitaj sve knjige zajedno\n        .ToListAsync();\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Datoteke va+┐ne za List stranice\n\n| Datoteka | Uloga |\n|----------|-------|\n| `Controllers/MyController.cs` | Index akcija - vra”ńa sve zapise |\n| `Views/MyFolder/Index.cshtml` | Prikaz liste svih zapisa |\n| `Services/IMyRepository.cs` | Interfejs za dohvat podataka |\n| `Models/MyEntity.cs` | Model klasa s relacijama |\n\n---\n\n## CSS klase kori+Ētene u primjeru\n\n```css\n.panel-card          /* Glavna sekcija kontejner */\n.panel-header        /* Header sa naslovom i brojem zapisa */\n.section-label       /* Labela tipa stranice (Index, Create, itd) */\n.panel-note          /* Dodatna napomena ili broj zapisa */\n.authors-stats       /* Kontejner za statistiku */\n.author-stat         /* Pojedina”Åna statistika (broj, prosjek) */\n.app-breadcrumb      /* Breadcrumb navigacija */\n.app-table           /* Tablica sa stilom */\n.table-responsive    /* Responsive tablica wrapper */\n.badge              /* Labele za brojeve (broj knjiga) */\n.app-cta-link       /* Call-to-action linkovi */\n.btn-primary        /* Primarni button */\n.d-none d-lg-block  /* Skriveno na mobilnom, vidljivo na desktopąŌ */\n.d-lg-none          /* Vidljivo samo na mobilnom */\n```\n\n---\n\n**Verzija**: 1.0  \n**Zadnja a+┐urenja**: 2026-05-07  \n**Autor**: GitHub \"Rad s List stranicama - Index view za prikaz kolekcija entiteta\"\napplyTo:\n  - \"**/Views/**/*.cshtml\"\n  - \"**/Controllers/*Controller.cs\"\n---\n\n# List Stranice (Index View) - Lab 3\n\nOvaj skill pru+┐aja smjernice za kreiranju i unaprje”┼enju Index (list) stranica za prikaz kolekcija podataka iz baze.\n\n## Kada koristiti ovaj skill\n\n- Trebate napraviti novu **Index view stranicu** za prikaz liste svih zapisa\n- Trebate **pobolj+Ēati postoje”ńu list stranicu** (dodati statistiku, search, filtering)\n- Trebate dodati **responsive dizajn** (tablica za desktop, kartice za mobile)\n- Trebate implementirati **empty state** (poruka kada nema podataka)\n\n## Va+┐ne karakteristike List stranica\n\nįØ∙ **Index akcija** u kontroleru koji vra”ńa sve zapise (async/await)\nįØ∙ **Model**: `IReadOnlyList<Entity>`\nįØ∙ **Breadcrumb navigacija** za bolje UX\nįØ∙ **Statistika** (broj zapisa, prosjeci, filtrirani rezultati)\nįØ∙ **Empty state** kada nema podataka\nįØ∙ **Responsive tablica** - table za desktop, kartice za mobile\nįØ∙ **Akcije** - linkovi na Details stranicu\nįØ∙ **Accessibility** - aria labels, semantic HTML\n\n## Korak-po-korak: Osnovna List stranica\n\n### Korak 1: Provjeri Controller Index akciju\n\n```csharp\n// Controllers/MyController.cs\n[Route(\"[controller]\")]\n[Route(\"ruta\")]\npublic class MyController : Controller\n{\n    private readonly IMyRepository _repository;\n\n    public MyController(IMyRepository repository)\n    {\n        _repository = repository;\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"\")]\n    [Route(\"index\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Index()\n    {\n        var items = await _repository.GetAllAsync();\n        return View(items);  // Vra”ńi listu\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### Korak 2: Kreiraj Index.cshtml u `Views/MyFolder/`\n\n```html\n@model IReadOnlyList<MyEntity>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Moji entiteti\";\n}\n\n<!-- Breadcrumb navigacija -->\n<nav aria-label=\"breadcrumb\" class=\"mb-3\">\n               </a>\n            </article>\n        }\n    </section>\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Korak-po-korak: Napredna List stranica sa Statistikom\n\n### Korak 1: Dodaj kalkulacije u view top\n\n```csharp\n@model IReadOnlyList<MyEntity>\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Entiteti\";\n    \n    // Kalkulacije za statistiku\n    var totalCount = Model.Count;\n    var activeCount = Model.Count(x => x.Status == Status.Active);\n    var inactiveCount = totalCount - activeCount;\n    var averageRating = totalCount == 0 ? 0 : Model.Average(x => x.Rating);\n}\n```\n\n### Korak 2: Prika+┐i statistiku\n\n```html\n<section class=\"panel-card stats-hero mb-4\" aria-labelledby=\"stats-heading\">\n    <div class=\"panel-header\">\n        <div>\n            <p class=\"section-label\">Index</p>\n            <h2 id=\"stats-heading\">Katalog entiteta</h2>\n        </div>\n        <span class=\"panel-note\">@totalCount zapisa</span>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"stats-grid\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Sa+┐etak statistike\">\n        <article class=\"stat-card\" role=\"listitem\">\n            <span>Ukupno</span>\n            <strong>@totalCount</strong>\n        </article>\n        <article class=\"stat-card\" role=\"listitem\">\n            <span>Aktivnih</span>\n            <strong>@activeCount</strong>\n        </article>\n        <article class=\"stat-card\" role=\"listitem\">\n            <span>Neaktivnih</span>\n            <strong>@inactiveCount</strong>\n        </article>\n        <article class=\"stat-card\" role=\"listitem\">\n            <span>Prosje”Åna ocjena</span>\n            <strong>@averageRating.ToString(\"0.0\")</strong>\n        </article>\n    </div>\n</section>\n```\n\n---\n\n## Best Practices\n\nįØ¶ **Koristi `IReadOnlyList<T>`** - sprje”Åava slu”Åajne izmjene\nįØ¶ **Uvijek dodaj empty state** - korisnik zna +Ēto se doga”┼a\nįØ¶ **Responsive design** - `d-none d-lg-block` za tablice, `d-lg-none` za kartice\nįØ¶ **Breadcrumb navigacija** - bolji UX i SEO\nįØ¶ **Aria labels** - za accessibility\nįØ¶ **Include relacije** - koristi `.Include()` u kontroleru kako izbegne+Ē N+1 problema\nįØ¶ **Async/await** - uvijek koristi za database pozive\nįØ¶ **Link-ovi na Details** - `asp-action=\"Details\" if (_cache.TryGetValue(DashboardCacheKey, out BookDashboardViewModel? cachedDashboard))\n        {\n            return cachedDashboard!;\n        }\n\n        // Load books without Reviews (will use separate Reviews query with User info)\n        var books = await _context.Books\n            .Include(b => b.Author)\n            .Include(b => b.Publisher)\n            .Include(b => b.BookGenres)\n            .ThenInclude(bg => bg.Genre)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        // Load all reviews with User info for calculations and recent reviews panel\n        var reviews = await _context.Reviews\n            .Include(r => r.User)\n            .OrderByDescending(review => review.ReviewedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        var genres = await _context.Genres\n            .Include(g => g.BookGenres)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        // Create dictionary for O(1) review lookup by BookId\n        var reviewsByBookId = reviews\n            .GroupBy(r => r.BookId)\n            .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList());\n\n        // Count authors and users directly from database (efficient Count queries)\n        var authorsCount = await _context.Authors.CountAsync();\n        var usersCount = await _context.Users.CountAsync();\n\n        var topBooks = books\n            .Select(b => BuildBookCard(b, reviewsByBookId.GetValueOrDefault(b.Id, new List<Review>())))\n            .OrderByDescending(book => book.AverageRating)\n            .ThenByDescending(book => book.ReviewCount)\n            .ToList();\n\n        var recentReviews = reviews\n            .Take(5)\n            .Select(review => new ReviewCardViewModel\n            {\n                BookTitle = review.Book?.Title ?? \"-\",\n                ReviewerName = review.User.FullName,\n                Score = review.Score,\n                Sentiment = review.Sentiment,\n                Comment = review.Comment,\n CRUD Repository Skill įŪ÷ Lab-4 Repository Extension\n\n**Svrha**: Pro+Ēiriti sve repository interfacee i implementacije s CRUD metodama (Create, Update, Delete, Search) prema Lab4.md zahtjevima za soft delete i AJAX pretragu.\n\n## Input Parametri\n\n- `entityName` įŪ÷ Naziv entiteta (Author, Book, Genre, Publisher, Review, User)\n- `repositoryPath` įŪ÷ Puna putanja do repozitorija (npr. `Services/AuthorRepository.cs`)\n- `interfacePath` įŪ÷ Puna putanja do interfacea (npr. `Services/IAuthorRepository.cs`)\n- `includeSearch` įŪ÷ `true` samo za Authors, Publishers, Genres; `false` za ostale\n\n## Output įŪ÷ Interfejs\n\nDodati tri nove metode u svaki `I*Repository` interfejs:\n\n```csharp\n// Dodati nakon GetByIdAsync\nTask<int> CreateAsync(T entity);\n\nTask<bool> UpdateAsync(T entity);\n\nTask<bool> DeleteAsync(int id);\n\n// Samo za Authors, Publishers, Genres:\nTask<IReadOnlyList<T>> SearchAsync(string query);\n```\n\n## Output įŪ÷ Implementacija\n\nDodati u svaki `*Repository` class:\n\n### CreateAsync\n```csharp\npublic async Task<int> CreateAsync(T entity)\n{\n    // Refleksija da postavi DeletedAt = null ako postoji\n    var deletedAtProperty = typeof(T).GetProperty(\"DeletedAt\");\n    if (deletedAtProperty != null && deletedAtProperty.CanWrite)\n    {\n        deletedAtProperty.SetValue(entity, null);\n    }\n    \n    _context.Set<T>().Add(entity);\n    await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n    \n    return (int)typeof(T).GetProperty(\"Id\")?.GetValue(entity)!;\n}\n```\n\n### UpdateAsync\n```csharp\npublic async Task<bool> UpdateAsync(T entity)\n{\n    try\n    {\n        _context.Set<T>().Update(entity);\n        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n        return true;\n    }\n    catch\n    {\n        return false;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### DeleteAsync (Soft Delete)\n```csharp\npublic async Task<bool> DeleteAsync(int id)\n{\n    try\n    {\n        var entity = await _context.Set<T>().FirstOrDefaultAsync(e => \n            EF.Property<int>(e, \"Id\") == id && \n            EF.Property<DateTime?>(e, \"DeletedAt\") == null);\n        \n        if (entity == null)\n            return false;\n        \n        var deletedAtProperty = typeof(T).GetProperty(\"DeletedAt\");\n        if (deletedAtProperty != null && deletedAtProperty.CanWrite)\n        {\n            deletedAtProperty.SetValue(entity, DateTime.UtcNow);\n            _context.Set<T>().Update(entity);\n            await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return true;\n        }\n        \n        return false;\n    }\n    catch\n    {\n        return false;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### SearchAsync (Samo za Authors, Publishers, Genres)\n\n**Za Author:**\n```csharp\npublic async Task<IReadOnlyList<Author>> SearchAsync(string query)\n{\n    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query))\n    {\n        return await GetAllAsync();\n    }\n    \n    var searchQuery = query.ToLower();\n    \n    return await _context.Authors\n        .Where(a => a.DeletedAt == null &&\n                   (a.FirstName.ToLower().Contains(searchQuery) ||\n                    a.LastName.ToLower().Contains(searchQuery)))\n        .OrderBy(a => a.LastName)\n        .ThenBy(a => a.FirstName)\n        .Take(20)\n        .ToListAsync();\n}\n```\n\n**Za Publisher:**\n```csharp\npublic async Task<IReadOnlyList<Publisher>> SearchAsync(string query)\n{\n    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query))\n    {\n        return await GetAllAsync();\n    }\n    \n    var searchQuery = query.ToLower();\n    \n    return await _context.Publishers\n        .Where(p => p.DeletedAt == null &&\n                   p.Name.ToLower().Contains(searchQuery))\n        .OrderBy(p => p.Name)\n        .Take(20)\n        .ToListAsync();\n}\n```\n\n**Za Genre:**\n```csharp\npublic async Task<IReadOnlyList<Genre>> SearchAsync(string query)\n{\n    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query))\n    {\n        return await GetAllAsync();\n    }\n    \n    var searchQuery = query.ToLower();\n    \n    return await _context.Genres\n        .Where(g => g.DeletedAt == null &&\n                   g.Name.ToLower().Contains(searchQuery))\n        .OrderBy(g => g.Name)\n        .Take(20)\n        .ToListAsync();\n}\n```\n\n## A+┐uriranje GetAllAsync Metode\n\n**VA+»NO**: Sve `GetAllAsync` metode MORAJU biti a+┐urirane da filtriraju obrisane zapise:\n\n```csharp\npublic async Task<IReadOnlyList<T>> GetAllAsync()\n{\n    return await _context.Set<T>()\n        .Where(e => EF.Property<DateTime?>(e, \"DeletedAt\") == null)\n        // ... ostatak koda (OrderBy, Include, itd.)\n        .ToListAsync();\n}\n```\n\n## A+┐uriranje GetByIdAsync Metode\n\n```csharp\npublic async Task<T?> GetByIdAsync(int id)\n{\n    return await _context.Set<T>()\n        .Where(e => EF.Property<int>(e, \"Id\") == id &&\n                   EF.Property<DateTime?>(e, \"DeletedAt\") == null)\n        // ... ostatak koda (Include, itd.)\n        .FirstOrDefaultAsync();\n}\n```\n\n## Interfejs Primjer (IAuthorRepository)\n\n```csharp\nnamespace Lab3.Services;\n\npublic interface IAuthorRepository\n{\n    Task<IReadOnlyList<Author>> GetAllAsync();\n\n    Task<Author?> GetByIdAsync(int id);\n\n    Task<int> CreateAsync(Author entity);\n\n    Task<bool> UpdateAsync(Author entity);\n\n    Task<bool> DeleteAsync(int id);\n\n    Task<IReadOnlyList<Author>> SearchAsync(string query);\n}\n```\n\n## Implementacija Primjer (AuthorRepository)\n\n```csharp\nnamespace Lab3.Services;\n\npublic class AuthorRepository : IAuthorRepository\n{\n    private readonly CatalogDbContext _context;\n\n    public AuthorRepository(CatalogDbContext context)\n    {\n        _context = context;\n    }\n\n    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Author>> GetAllAsync()\n    {\n        return await _context.Authors\n            .Where(a => a.DeletedAt == null)\n            .Include(a => a.Books)\n            .OrderBy(a => a.LastName)\n            .ThenBy(a => a.FirstName)\n            .ToListAsync();\n    }\n\n    public async Task<Author?> GetByIdAsync(int id)\n    {\n        return await _context.Authors\n            .Where(a => a.DeletedAt == null)\n            .Include(a => a.Books)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(a => a.Id == id);\n    }\n\n    public async Task<int> CreateAsync(Author entity)\n    {\n        entity.DeletedAt = null;\n        _context.Authors.Add(entity);\n        await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n        return entity.Id;\n    }\n\n    public async Task<bool> UpdateAsync(Author entity)\n    {\n        try\n        {\n            _context.Authors.Update(entity);\n            await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return true;\n        }\n        catch\n        {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    public async Task<bool> DeleteAsync(int id)\n    {\n        try\n        {\n            var author = await GetByIdAsync(id);\n            if (author == null)\n                return false;\n\n            author.DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\n            _context.Authors.Update(author);\n            await _context.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return true;\n        }\n        catch\n        {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Author>> SearchAsync(string query)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query))\n        {\n            return await GetAllAsync();\n        }\n\n        var searchQuery = query.ToLower();\n\n        return await _context.Authors\n            .Where(a => a.DeletedAt == null &&\n                       (a.FirstName.ToLower().Contains(searchQuery) ||\n                        a.LastName.ToLower().Contains(searchQuery)))\n            .OrderBy(a => a.LastName)\n            .ThenBy(a => a.FirstName)\n            .Take(20)\n            .ToListAsync();\n    }\n}\n```\n\n## Va+┐ne Napomene\n\n1. **Soft Delete**: DeleteAsync NIKADA ne poziva `Remove()`, ve”ń postavlja `DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow`\n2. **Filtriranje**: Sve query metode MORAJU filtrirati gdje je `DeletedAt == null`\n3. **SearchAsync**: Trebam ga dodati SAMO za Authors, Publishers, Genres (za AJAX pretragu)\n4. **Redoslijed**: {"timestamp":"2026-05-17T11:51:14.211Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"c4217472-c7fa-491c-9e83-d980e17bca43","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6a77abf5eb406318942f42fee0e4b058\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\c4217472-c7fa-491c-9e83-d980e17bca43.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"# CRUD Controller Skill įŪ÷ Lab-4 Controller Actions\n\n**Svrha**: Generirati sve CRUD akcije (Create, Edit, Delete) u kontrolerima prema Lab4.md zahtjevima s validacijom, TryUpdateModel, soft delete i popunjavanjem ViewBag za dropdowne.\n\n## Input Parametri\n\n- `entityName` įŪ÷ Naziv entiteta (Author, Book, Genre, Publisher, Review, User)\n- `controllerName` įŪ÷ Naziv kontrolera (AuthorsController, BooksController, itd.)\n- `repositoryInterface` įŪ÷ Interfejs repozitorija (IAuthorRepository, IBookRepository, itd.)\n- `foreignKeys` įŪ÷ Lista FK polja ako postoje (npr. [{ field: \"AuthorId\", repoInterface: \"IAuthorRepository\", listProperty: \"Authors\" }])\n\n## Output įŪ÷ Sve Akcije\n\n### 1. Create įŪ÷ GET (Prikaz Forme)\n\n```csharp\n[HttpGet]\n[Route(\"create\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> Create()\n{\n    // Popuni ViewBag s opcijama za sve dropdowne\n    await PopulateDropdownsAsync();\n    \n    return View(new T());\n}\n```\n\n### 2. Create įŪ÷ POST (Spremanje)\n\n```csharp\n[HttpPost]\n[Route(\"create\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> Create(T model)\n{\n    if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n    {\n        await PopulateDropdownsAsync();\n        return View(model);\n    }\n    \n    try\n    {\n        var id = await _repository.CreateAsync(model);\n        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n    }\n    catch (Exception ex)\n    {\n        ModelState.AddModelError(string.Empty, \"Gre+Ēka pri spremanju: \" + ex.Message);\n        await PopulateDropdownsAsync();\n        return View(model);\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### 3. Edit įŪ÷ GET (Prikaz Forme za Edit)\n\n```csharp\n[HttpGet]\n[Route(\"edit/{id:int}\")]\n[ActionName(\"Edit\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> EditGet(int id)\n{\n    var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id);\n    if (entity == null)\n    {\n        return NotFound();\n    }\n    \n    await PopulateDropdownsAsync(entity); // Proslje”┼i entitet da zna koji je trenutno odabran\n    \n    return View(\"Edit\", entity);\n}\n```\n\n### 4. Edit įŪ÷ POST (A+┐uriranje)\n\n```csharp\n[HttpPost]\n[Route(\"edit/{id:int}\")]\n[ActionName(\"Edit\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> EditPost(int id)\n{\n    var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id);\n    if (entity == null)\n    {\n        return NotFound();\n    }\n    \n    // Koristi TryUpdateModel za sigurnost\n    var updateOk = await TryUpdateModelAsync(entity);\n    \n    if (!updateOk || !ModelState.IsValid)\n    {\n        await PopulateDropdownsAsync(entity);\n        return View(\"Edit\", entity);\n    }\n    \n    try\n    {\n        var success = await _repository.UpdateAsync(entity);\n        if (!success)\n        {\n            throw new Exception(\"Neuspje+Ēno a+┐uriranje u bazi\");\n        }\n        \n        return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n    }\n    catch (Exception ex)\n    {\n        ModelState.AddModelError(string.Empty, \"Gre+Ēka pri a+┐uriranju: \" + ex.Message);\n        await PopulateDropdownsAsync(entity);\n        return View(\"Edit\", entity);\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### 5. Delete įŪ÷ POST (Soft Delete)\n\n```csharp\n[HttpPost]\n[Route(\"delete/{id:int}\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n{\n    try\n    {\n        var success = await _repository.DeleteAsync(id);\n        \n        if (!success)\n        {\n            return Json(new { success = false, message = \"Entitet nije prona”┼en\" });\n        }\n        \n        return Json(new { success = true, message = \"Entitet je uspje+Ēno obrisan\" });\n    }\n    catch (Exception ex)\n    {\n        return Json(new { success = false, message = \"Gre+Ēka pri brisanju: \" + ex.Message });\n    }\n}\n```\n\n### 6. PopulateDropdownsAsync įŪ÷ Helper Metoda\n\n```csharp\nprivate async Task PopulateDropdownsAsync(T? entity = null)\n{\n    // Primjer za Book:\n    var authors = await _authorRepository.GetAllAsync();\n    ViewBag.Authors = authors.Select(a => new SelectListItem \n    { \n        Value = a.Id.ToString(), \n        Text = $\"{a.FirstName} {a.LastName}\",\n        Selected = entity != null && entity.AuthorId == a.Id\n    }).ToList();\n    \n    var publishers = await _publisherRepository.GetAllAsync();\n    ViewBag.Publishers = publishers.Select(p => new SelectListItem \n    { \n        Value = p.Id.ToString(), \n        Text = p.Name,\n        Selected = entity != null && entity.PublisherId == p.Id\n    }).ToList();\n    \n    var genres = await _genreRepository.GetAllAsync();\n    ViewBag.Genres = genres.Select(g => new SelectListItem \n    { \n        Value = g.Id.ToString(), \n        Text = g.Name\n    }).ToList();\n    \n    // Za stati”Åke dropdowne:\n    ViewBag.Statuses = Enum.GetValues(typeof(BookStatus))\n        .Cast<BookStatus>()\n        .Select(s => new SelectListItem \n        { \n            Value = s.ToString(), \n            Text = s.ToString(),\n            Selected = entity != null && entity.Status == s\n        })\n        .ToList();\n}\n```\n\n## Primjer Kompletnog AuthorsController\n\n```csharp\nusing Lab3.Models;\nusing Lab3.Services;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\n\nnamespace Lab3.Controllers;\n\n[Route(\"[controller]\")]\n[Route(\"autori\")]\npublic class AuthorsController : Controller\n{\n    private readonly IAuthorRepository _repository;\n\n    public AuthorsController(IAuthorRepository repository)\n    {\n        _repository = repository;\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"\")]\n    [Route(\"index\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Index()\n    {\n        var authors = await _repository.GetAllAsync();\n        return View(authors);\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Route(\"profil/{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Details(int id)\n    {\n        var author = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id);\n        if (author is null)\n        {\n            return NotFound();\n        }\n\n        return View(author);\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet]\n    [Route(\"create\")]\n    public IActionResult Create()\n    {\n        return View();\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Route(\"create\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Create(Author model)\n    {\n        if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n        {\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        try\n        {\n            await _repository.CreateAsync(model);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(string.Empty, \"Gre+Ēka pri spremanju: \" + ex.Message);\n            return View(model);\n        }\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet]\n    [Route(\"edit/{id:int}\")]\n    [ActionName(\"Edit\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> EditGet(int id)\n    {\n        var author = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id);\n        if (author == null)\n        {\n            return NotFound();\n        }\n\n        return View(\"Edit\", author);\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Route(\"edit/{id:int}\")]\n    [ActionName(\"Edit\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> EditPost(int id)\n    {\n        var author = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id);\n        if (author == null)\n        {\n            return NotFound();\n        }\n\n        var updateOk = await TryUpdateModelAsync(author);\n\n        if (!updateOk || !ModelState.IsValid)\n        {\n            return View(\"Edit\", author);\n        }\n\n        try\n        {\n            var success = await _repository.UpdateAsync(author);\n            if (!success)\n            {\n                throw new Exception(\"Neuspje+Ēno a+┐uriranje\");\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(string.Empty, \"Gre+Ēka pri a+┐uriranju: \" + ex.Message);\n            return View(\"Edit\", author);\n        }\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Route(\"delete/{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n    {\n        try\n        {\n            var success = await _repository.DeleteAsync(id);\n\n            if (!success)\n            {\n                return Json(new { success = false, message = \"Autor nije prona”┼en\" });\n            }\n\n            return Json(new { success = true, message = \"Autor je uspje+Ēno obrisan\" });\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            return Json(new { success = false, message = \"Gre+Ēka pri brisanju: \" + ex.Message });\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n## Primjer Kompletnog BooksController (s FK Dropdownima)\n\n```csharp\nusing Lab3.Models;\nusing Lab3.Services;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\n\nnamespace Lab3.Controllers;\n\n[Route(\"[controller]\")]\n[Route(\"knjige\")]\npublic class BooksController : Controller\n{\n    private readonly IBookRepository _bookRepository;\n    private readonly IAuthorRepository _authorRepository;\n    private readonly IPublisherRepository _publisherRepository;\n    private readonly IGenreRepository _genreRepository;\n\n    public BooksController(\n        IBookRepository bookRepository,\n        IAuthorRepository authorRepository,\n        IPublisherRepository publisherRepository,\n        IGenreRepository genreRepository)\n    {\n        _bookRepository = bookRepository;\n        _authorRepository = authorRepository;\n        _publisherRepository = publisherRepository;\n        _genreRepository = genreRepository;\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"\")]\n    [Route(\"index\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Index()\n    {\n        var books = await _bookRepository.GetAllAsync();\n        return View(books);\n    }\n\n    [Route(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Route(\"detalji/{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Details(int id)\n    {\n        var book = await _bookRepository.GetByIdAsync(id);\n        if (book is null)\n        {\n            return NotFound();\n        }\n\n        return View(book);\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet]\n    [Route(\"create\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Create()\n    {\n        await PopulateDropdownsAsync();\n        return View();\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Route(\"create\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Create(Book model)\n    {\n        if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n        {\n            await PopulateDropdownsAsync();\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        try\n        {\n            await _bookRepository.CreateAsync(model);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(string.Empty, \"Gre+Ēka pri spremanju: \" + ex.Message);\n            await PopulateDropdownsAsync();\n            return View(model);\n        }\n    }\n\n    [HttpGet]\n    [Route(\"edit/{id:int}\")]\n    [ActionName(\"Edit\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> EditGet(int id)\n    {\n        var book = await _bookRepository.GetByIdAsync(id);\n        if (book == null)\n        {\n            return NotFound();\n        }\n\n        await PopulateDropdownsAsync(book);\n        return View(\"Edit\", book);\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Route(\"edit/{id:int}\")]\n    [ActionName(\"Edit\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> EditPost(int id)\n    {\n        var book = await _bookRepository.GetByIdAsync(id);\n        if (book == null)\n        {\n            return NotFound();\n        }\n\n        var updateOk = await TryUpdateModelAsync(book);\n\n        if (!updateOk || !ModelState.IsValid)\n        {\n            await PopulateDropdownsAsync(book);\n            return View(\"Edit\", book);\n        }\n\n        try\n        {\n            var success = await _bookRepository.UpdateAsync(book);\n            if (!success)\n            {\n                throw new Exception(\"Neuspje+Ēno a+┐uriranje\");\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(string.Empty, \"Gre+Ēka pri a+┐uriranju: \" + ex.Message);\n            await PopulateDropdownsAsync(book);\n            return View(\"Edit\", book);\n        }\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost]\n    [Route(\"delete/{id:int}\")]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Delete(int id)\n    {\n        try\n        {\n            var success = await _bookRepository.DeleteAsync(id);\n\n            if (!success)\n            {\n                return Json(new { success = false, message = \"Knjiga nije prona”┼ena\" });\n            }\n\n            return Json(new { success = true, message = \"Knjiga je uspje+Ēno obrisana\" });\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            return Json(new { success = false, message = \"Gre+Ēka pri brisanju: \" + ex.Message });\n        }\n    }\n\n    private async Task PopulateDropdownsAsync(Book? book = null)\n    {\n        var authors = await _authorRepository.GetAllAsync();\n        ViewBag.Authors = authors.Select(a => new SelectListItem\n        {\n            Value = a.Id.ToString(),\n            Text = $\"{a.FirstName} {a.LastName}\",\n            Selected = book != null && book.AuthorId == a.Id\n        }).ToList();\n\n        var publishers = await _publisherRepository.GetAllAsync();\n        ViewBag.Publishers = publishers.Select(p => new SelectListItem\n        {\n            Value = p.Id.ToString(),\n            Text = p.Name,\n            Selected = book != null && book.PublisherId == p.Id\n        }).ToList();\n\n        var genres = await _genreRepository.GetAllAsync();\n        ViewBag.Genres = genres.Select(g => new SelectListItem\n        {\n            Value = g.Id.ToString(),\n            Text = g.Name\n        }).ToList();\n\n        ViewBag.Statuses = Enum.GetValues(typeof(BookStatus))\n            .Cast<BookStatus>()\n            .Select(s => new SelectListItem\n            {\n                Value = s.ToString(),\n                Text = s.ToString(),\n                Selected = book != null && book.Status == s\n            })\n            .ToList();\n    }\n}\n```\n\n## Va+┐ne Napomene\n\n1. **TryUpdateModelAsync**: MORA biti kori+Ētena u EditPost akciji za sigurnost\n2. **ActionName atribut**: EditGet i EditPost trebaju `[ActionName(\"Edit\")]` jer imaju istu URL\n3. **ModelState.IsValid**: MORA biti provjereno prije spremanja\n4. **Soft Delete**: DeleteAsync postavlja DeletedAt, ne bri+Ēe zapis\n5. **PopulateDropdownsAsync**: Trebam je pozvati i u Create GET i POST (ako validacija ne pro”┼e)\n6. **ViewBag**: Koristi se za proslje”┼ivanje opcija u view\n\n## Verifikacija\n\n- [ ] Create (GET i POST) akcije postoje\n- [ ] Edit (GET i POST) akcije postoje s ActionName atributom\n- [ ] Delete (POST) akcija vra”ńa JSON s success/message\n- [ ] ModelState.IsValid je provjereno\n- [ ] TryUpdateModelAsync je kori+Ētena u EditPost\n- [ ] PopulateDropdownsAsync je pozvan na svim potrebnim mjestima\n- [ ] Kod string fieldName = ViewBag.FieldName ?? \"id\";\n    string displayText = ViewBag.DisplayText ?? \"Display\";\n    string placeholder = ViewBag.Placeholder ?? \"Po”Åni pisati...\";\n    string searchUrl = ViewBag.SearchUrl ?? \"/api/search\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"autocomplete-wrapper\">\n    <input type=\"text\" \n           id=\"@fieldName-search\" \n           class=\"form-control autocomplete-input\"\n           placeholder=\"@placeholder\"\n           data-search-url=\"@searchUrl\"\n           data-field-name=\"@fieldName\"\n           data-display-text=\"@displayText\" />\n    \n    <input type=\"hidden\" id=\"@fieldName-id\" />\n    \n    <ul class=\"autocomplete-results\" id=\"@fieldName-results\" style=\"display: none;\">\n        <!-- Rezultati ”ńe biti dinami”Åki dodani JavaScript-om -->\n    </ul>\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n    <script type=\"text/javascript\">\n        $(document).ready(function () {\n            const fieldName = \"@fieldName\";\n            const searchUrl = \"@searchUrl\";\n            \n            const $input = $(`#${fieldName}-search`);\n            const $resultsList = $(`#${fieldName}-results`);\n            const $hiddenInput = $(`#${fieldName}-id`);\n            \n            let searchTimeout;\n            \n            $input.on(\"keyup\", function () {\n                const query = $(this).val().trim();\n                \n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                \n                if (query.length < 2) {\n                    $resultsList.hide();\n                    return;\n                }\n                \n                searchTimeout = setTimeout(function () {\n                    $.ajax({\n                        url: searchUrl,\n                        type: \"GET\",\n                        data: { query: query },\n                        success: function (data) {\n                            $resultsList.empty();\n                            \n                            if (!data || data.length === 0) {\n                                $resultsList.append('<li class=\"no-results\">Nema rezultata</li>');\n                                $resultsList.show();\n                                return;\n                            }\n                            \n                            data.forEach(function (item) {\n                                const $li = $(`<li data-id=\"${item.id}\" class=\"autocomplete-item\">${item.text}</li>`);\n                                $li.on(\"click\", function () {\n                                    $input.val(item.text);\n                                    $hiddenInput.val(item.id);\n                                    $resultsList.hide();\n                                });\n                                $resultsList.append($li);\n                            });\n                            \n                            $resultsList.show();\n                        },\n                        error: function () {\n                            $resultsList.empty().append('<li class=\"error\">Gre+Ēka pri pretrazi</li>').show();\n                        }\n                    });\n                }, 300);\n            });\n            \n            $(document).on(\"click\", function (e) {\n                if (!$(e.target).closest(\".autocomplete-wrapper\").length) {\n                    $resultsList.hide();\n                }\n            });\n        });\n    </script>\n}\n\n<style>\n    .autocomplete-wrapper {\n        position: relative;\n        width: 100%;\n    }\n    \n    .autocomplete-input {\n        width: 100%;\n    }\n    \n    .autocomplete-results {\n        position: absolute;\n        top: 100%;\n        left: 0;\n        right: 0;\n        list-style: none;\n        margin: 0;\n        padding: 0;\n        border: 1px solid #ddd;\n        border-top: none;\n        background: white;\n        max-height: 300px;\n        overflow-y: auto;\n        z-index: 1000;\n    }\n    \n    .autocomplete-item {\n        padding: 10px;\n        cursor: pointer;\n        transition: background-color 0.2s;\n    }\n    \n    .autocomplete-item:hover {\n        background-color: #f5f5f5;\n    }\n    \n    .no-results,\n    .error {\n        padding: 10px;\n        color: #999;\n        font-style: italic;\n    }\n</style>\n```\n\n### `_DateTimeControl.cshtml`\n\n```html\n@{\n    string fieldName = ViewBag.FieldName ?? \"dateTime\";\n    DateTime? value = ViewBag.Value as DateTime?;\n    string dateFormat = System.Globalization.CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.Name == \"hr\" ? \"dd.MM.yyyy\" : \"MM/dd/yyyy\";\n    string timeFormat = \"HH:mm\";\n}\n\n<div class=\"datetime-control\">\n    <div class=\"row g-2\">\n        <div class=\"col-md-6\">\n            <input type=\"text\" \n                   id=\"@fieldName-date\" \n                   class=\"form-control datetime-input\"\n                   placeholder=\"@dateFormat\"\n                   value=\"@(value?.ToString(dateFormat) ?? \"\")\"\n                   data-date-format=\"@dateFormat\"\n                   data-field-name=\"@fieldName\" />\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"col-md-6\">\n            <input type=\"text\" \n                   id=\"@fieldName-time\" \n                   class=\"form-control datetime-input\"\n                   placeholder=\"@timeFormat\"\n                   value=\"@(value?.ToString(timeFormat) ?? \"\")\"\n                   data-time-format=\"@timeFormat\"\n                   data-field-name=\"@fieldName\" />\n        </div>\n    </div>\n    <input type=\"hidden\" id=\"@fieldName-combined\" name=\"@fieldName\" />\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n    <script type=\"text/javascript\">\n        $(document).ready(function () {\n            const fieldName = \"@fieldName\";\n            const dateFormat = \"@dateFormat\";\n            const timeFormat = \"@timeFormat\";\n            \n            const $dateInput = $(`#${fieldName}-date`);\n            const $timeInput = $(`#${fieldName}-time`);\n            const $combinedInput = $(`#${fieldName}-combined`);\n            \n            function updateCombinedValue() {\n                const dateStr = $dateInput.val();\n                const timeStr = $timeInput.val();\n                \n                if (dateStr && timeStr) {\n                    // Konjugacija datuma i vremena\n                    const dateObj = new Date(dateStr.split('.').reverse().join('-'));\n                    if (!isNaN(dateObj)) {\n                        const [hours, minutes] = timeStr.split(':');\n                        dateObj.setHours(parseInt(hours), parseInt(minutes), 0);\n                        $combinedInput.val(dateObj.toISOString());\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            \n            $dateInput.on(\"change\", updateCombinedValue);\n            $timeInput.on(\"change\", updateCombinedValue);\n            \n            // Validacija datuma\n            $dateInput.on(\"blur\", function () {\n                const value = $(this).val();\n                if (value) {\n                    const parts = value.split('.');\n                    if (parts.length === 3) {\n                        const day = parseInt(parts[0]);\n                        const month = parseInt(parts[1]);\n                        const year = parseInt(parts[2]);\n                        \n                        const date = new Date(year, month - 1, day);\n                        if (isNaN(date.getTime()) || date.getDate() !== day) {\n                            $(this).addClass(\"is-invalid\").siblings(\".invalid-feedback\").text(\"Neispravna vrijednost datuma\");\n                            $combinedInput.val(\"\");\n                            return;\n                        }\n                        \n                        $(this).removeClass(\"is-invalid\");\n                    }\n                }\n            });\n        });\n    </script>\n}\n\n<style>\n    .datetime-control {\n        width: 100%;\n    }\n    \n    .datetime-input.is-invalid {\n        border-color: #dc3545;\n    }\n</style>\n```\n\n## Output 2 įŪ÷ Create/Edit Forms (_CreateOrEdit Partial)\n\n### function (e) {\n                // Validacija se okida automatski kroz HTML5 atribute\n                if (!form.checkValidity()) {\n                    e.preventDefault();\n                    e.stopPropagation();\n                }\n                form.classList.add('was-validated');\n            }, false);\n        });\n    </script>\n}\n```\n\n### `Books/_CreateOrEdit.cshtml`\n\n```html\n@model Book\n\n<div class=\"form-container\">\n    @if (Model?.Id > 0)\n    {\n        <h2>A+┐uriranje Knjige</h2>\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        <h2>Dodaj         <select asp-for=\"Status\" asp-items=\"ViewBag.Statuses\" class=\"form-select\"></select>\n            <span asp-validation-for=\"Status\" class=\"text-danger small\"></span>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"form-group mb-3\">\n            <label for=\"author-search\" class=\"form-label\">Autor</label>\n            @{\n                ViewBag.FieldName = \"AuthorId\";\n                ViewBag.DisplayText = Model?.Author?.FirstName + \" \" + Model?.Author?.LastName;\n                ViewBag.Placeholder = \"Pretra+┐i autore...\";\n                ViewBag.SearchUrl = \"/Authors/Search\";\n            }\n            <partial name=\"_AutocompleteDropdown\" />\n            <span asp-validation-for=\"AuthorId\" class=\"text-danger small\"></span>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"form-group mb-3\">\n            <label for=\"publisher-search\" class=\"form-label\">Izdava”Å</label>\n            @{\n                ViewBag.FieldName = \"PublisherId\";\n                ViewBag.DisplayText = Model?.Publisher?.Name;\n                ViewBag.Placeholder = \"Pretra+┐i izdava”Åe...\";\n                ViewBag.SearchUrl = \"/Publishers/Search\";\n            }\n            <partial name=\"_AutocompleteDropdown\" />\n            <span asp-validation-for=\"PublisherId\" class=\"text-danger small\"></span>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"form-group\">\n            <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-primary\">Spremi</button>\n            <a asp-action=\"Index\" class=\"btn btn-secondary\">Odustani</a>\n        </div>\n    </form>\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n    <partial name=\"_ValidationScriptsPartial\" />\n    <script>\n        $(document).ready(function () {\n            const form = document.querySelector('.needs-validation');\n            \n            form.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {\n                if (!form.checkValidity()) {\n                    e.preventDefault();\n                    e.stopPropagation();\n                }\n                form.classList.add('was-validated');\n            }, false);\n        });\n    </script>\n}\n```\n\n## Output 3 įŪ÷ Create/Edit Views\n\n### `Authors/Create.cshtml` i  <input type=\"text\" \n                   id=\"search-input\" \n                   class=\"form-control\" \n                   placeholder=\"Pretra+┐i autore...\" />\n        </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div id=\"results-container\">\n        <table class=\"table table-striped\">\n            <thead>\n                <tr>\n                    <th>Ime</th>\n                    <th>Prezime</th>\n                    <th>Nacionalnost</th>\n                    <th>Akcije</th>\n                </tr>\n            </thead>\n            <tbody id=\"authors-table\">\n                @foreach (var author in <td>@author.LastName</td>\n                        <td>@author.Nationality</td>\n                        <td>\n                            <a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@author.Id\" <button type=\"button\" \n                                    class=\"btn btn-sm btn-danger delete-btn\" \n                                    data-id=\"@author.Id\"\n                                    data-name=\"@author.FirstName @author.LastName\">\n                                Obri+Ēi\n                            </button>\n                        </td>\n                    </tr>\n                }\n            </tbody>\n        </table>\n    </div>\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n    <script>\n        $(document).ready(function () {\n            const $searchInput = $(\"#search-input\");\n            const $authorsTable = $(\"#authors-table\");\n            let searchTimeout;\n            \n            // AJAX pretraga\n            $searchInput.on(\"keyup\", function () {\n                const query = $(this).val().trim();\n                \n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                \n                searchTimeout = setTimeout(function () {\n                    $.ajax({\n                        url: \"/Authors/Search\",\n                        type: \"GET\",\n                        data: { query: query },\n                        success: function (data) {\n                            $authorsTable.empty();\n                            \n                            if (!data || data.length === 0) {\n                                $authorsTable.html('<tr><td colspan=\"4\" class=\"text-center\">Nema rezultata</td></tr>');\n                                return;\n                            }\n                            \n                            data.forEach(function (author) {\n                                const row = `<tr data-author-id=\"${author.id}\" class=\"author-row\">\n                                    <td>${author.firstName}</td>\n                                    <td>${author.lastName}</td>\n                                    <td>${author.nationality}</td>\n                                    <td>\n                                        <a href=\"/Authors/${author.id}\" class=\"btn btn-sm btn-info\">Detalji</a>\n                                        <a href=\"/Authors/Edit/${author.id}\" class=\"btn btn-sm btn-warning\">Uredi</a>\n                                        <button type=\"button\" class=\"btn btn-sm btn-danger delete-btn\" data-id=\"${author.id}\" data-name=\"${author.firstName} ${author.lastName}\">Obri+Ēi</button>\n                                    </td>\n                                </tr>`;\n                                $authorsTable.append(row);\n                            });\n                            \n                            // Re-bind delete buttons\n                            bindDeleteButtons();\n                        }\n                    });\n                }, 300);\n            });\n            \n            function bindDeleteButtons() {\n                $(\".delete-btn\").on(\"click\", function () {\n                    const $btn = $(this);\n                    const id = $btn.data(\"id\");\n                    const name = $btn.data(\"name\");\n                    \n                    if (confirm(`Jeste li sigurni da +┐elite obrisati \"${name}\"?`)) {\n                        $.ajax({\n                            url: `/Authors/Delete/${id}`,\n                            type: \"POST\",\n                            success: function (response) {\n                                if (response.success) {\n                                    // Fade out animation\n                                    $(`tr[data-author-id=\"${id}\"]`).fadeOut(300, function () {\n                                        $(this).remove();\n                                    });\n                                } else {\n                                    alert(response.message || \"Gre+Ēka pri brisanju\");\n                                }\n                            },\n                            error: function () {\n                                alert(\"Gre+Ēka pri komunikaciji sa serverom\");\n                            }\n                        });\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n            \n            // Inicijalna bind\n            bindDeleteButtons();\n        });\n    </script>\n}\n```\n\n## Kontroler Search Akcija (Potrebna za Autocomplete)\n\n```csharp\n[HttpGet]\n[Route(\"search\")]\npublic async Task<IActionResult> Search(string query)\n{\n    var results = await _repository.SearchAsync(query);\n    \n    var data = results.Select(a => new \n    { \n        id = a.Id, \n        text = $\"{a.FirstName} {a.LastName}\"\n    }).ToList();\n    \n    return Json(data);\n}\n```\n\n## Va+┐ne Napomene\n\n1. **Partial Views**: `_AutocompleteDropdown.cshtml` i `_DateTimeControl.cshtml` trebaju biti u `Views/Shared/`\n2. **DateTime Format**: Trebam koristiti `CultureInfo.CurrentCulture` za detektiranje jezika\n3. **Validacija**: `asp-validation-for` je obavezna za svako polje\n4. **AJAX**: `SearchAsync` metoda trebam u kontroleru za autocomplete\n5. {"timestamp":"2026-05-17T11:52:18.444Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"c4217472-c7fa-491c-9e83-d980e17bca43","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6a77abf5eb406318942f42fee0e4b058\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\c4217472-c7fa-491c-9e83-d980e17bca43.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"# JavaScript Stars Animation Skill įŪ÷ Lab-4 Advanced JS Animation\n\n**Svrha**: Generirati `stars-animation.js` datoteku s animacijom zvijezda/to”Åkica koje prate mi+Ē prema Lab4.md zahtjevima za napredno kori+Ētenje JavaScripta i animacije u slu+┐bi aplikacije.\n\n## Output įŪ÷ `wwwroot/js/stars-animation.js`\n\n```javascript\n/**\n * Stars Animation įŪ÷ Zvijezde/to”Åkice koje prate mi+Ē\n * Parametri se mogu podesiti na po”Åetku datoteke\n */\n\n(function () {\n    'use strict';\n\n    // ========== KONFIGURACIJA ==========\n    const CONFIG = {\n        STAR_COUNT: 300,              // Broj zvijezda (3x vi+Ēe od baseline)\n        STAR_SIZE: 2,                 // Veli”Åina to”Åkice u pikselima\n        MIN_SPEED: 0.5,               // Minimalna brzina (px/frame)\n        MAX_SPEED: 3,                 // Maksimalna brzina\n        ROGUE_STAR_COUNT: 7,          // Broj zvijezda koje se ne prate mi+Ēem (5-10)\n        EASE_FACTOR: 0.1,             // Faktor za glatko skaliranje brzine\n        ANIMATION_FRAME_RATE: 60      // FPS\n    };\n\n    // ========== INICIJALIZACIJA ==========\n\n    class StarsAnimation {\n        constructor() {\n            this.stars = [];\n            this.mouseX = window.innerWidth / 2;\n            this.mouseY = window.innerHeight / 2;\n            this.animationId = null;\n            this.isRunning = false;\n\n            this.init();\n        }\n\n        init() {\n            // Kreiraj canvas element\n            this.canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n            this.canvas.id = 'stars-canvas';\n            this.canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n            this.canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n            this.canvas.style.cssText = `\n                position: fixed;\n                top: 0;\n                left: 0;\n                width: 100%;\n                height: 100%;\n                z-index: -1;\n                pointer-events: none;\n                background: transparent;\n            `;\n\n            document.body.insertBefore(this.canvas, document.body.firstChild);\n            this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d');\n\n            // Generiraj zvijezde\n            this.generateStars();\n\n            // Eventlisener za mi+Ē\n            document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n            window.addEventListener('resize', () => this.handleResize());\n\n            // Zapo”Åni animaciju\n            this.start();\n        }\n\n        generateStars() {\n            this.stars = [];\n\n            for (let i = 0; i < CONFIG.STAR_COUNT; i++) {\n                const isRogue = i < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT;\n                const star = {\n                    x: Math.random() * window.innerWidth,\n                    y: Math.random() * window.innerHeight,\n                    size: CONFIG.STAR_SIZE,\n                    baseSpeed: isRogue ? \n                        (Math.random() * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED) + CONFIG.MIN_SPEED) : \n                        CONFIG.MIN_SPEED,\n                    currentSpeed: CONFIG.MIN_SPEED,\n                    isRogue: isRogue,\n                    opacity: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.5 // 0.5 do 1\n                };\n                this.stars.push(star);\n            }\n        }\n\n        handleMouseMove(e) {\n            this.mouseX = e.clientX;\n            this.mouseY = e.clientY;\n        }\n\n        handleResize() {\n            this.canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n            this.canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n        }\n\n        calculateSpeed(star) {\n            // Ako je rogue zvijezda, koristi vlastitu brzinu\n            if (star.isRogue) {\n                star.currentSpeed = star.baseSpeed;\n                return;\n            }\n\n            // Izra”Åunaj udaljenost mi+Ēa od centra ekrana\n            const centerX = window.innerWidth / 2;\n            const centerY = window.innerHeight / 2;\n\n            const distX = Math.abs(this.mouseX - centerX);\n            const distY = Math.abs(this.mouseY - centerY);\n\n            const maxDist = Math.sqrt(centerX * centerX + centerY * centerY);\n            const dist = Math.sqrt(distX * distX + distY * distY);\n\n            // Normaliziraj udaljenost (0 = centar, 1 = rub)\n            const normalized = Math.min(dist / maxDist, 1);\n\n            // Mapira u raspon brzina (inverzno: bli+┐e centar = sporije)\n            const targetSpeed = CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + (1 - normalized) * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n\n            // Glatko skaliranje brzine\n            star.currentSpeed += (targetSpeed - star.currentSpeed) * CONFIG.EASE_FACTOR;\n        }\n\n        update() {\n            for (let star of this.stars) {\n                this.calculateSpeed(star);\n\n                // Izra”Åunaj smjer od mi+Ēa\n                const angle = Math.atan2(star.y - this.mouseY, star.x - this.mouseX);\n\n                // Pomakni zvijezdu prema mi+Ē poziciji\n                star.x += Math.cos(angle) * star.currentSpeed;\n                star.y += Math.sin(angle) * star.currentSpeed;\n\n                // Regeneriraj zvijezdu ako je izvan ekrana\n                if (star.x < -10 || star.x > window.innerWidth + 10 ||\n                    star.y < -10 || star.y > window.innerHeight + 10) {\n                    this.regenerateStar(star);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        regenerateStar(star) {\n            // Nasumi”Åno odaberi stranu s koje ”ńe zvijezda do”ńi\n            const side = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);\n\n            switch (side) {\n                case 0: // Od lijevog ruba\n                    star.x = -10;\n                    star.y = Math.random() * window.innerHeight;\n                    break;\n                case 1: // Od desnog ruba\n                    star.x = window.innerWidth + 10;\n                    star.y = Math.random() * window.innerHeight;\n                    break;\n                case 2: // Od vrha\n                    star.x = Math.random() * window.innerWidth;\n                    star.y = -10;\n                    break;\n                case 3: // Od dna\n                    star.x = Math.random() * window.innerWidth;\n                    star.y = window.innerHeight + 10;\n                    break;\n            }\n        }\n\n        draw() {\n            // O”Åisti canvas\n            this.ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)';\n            this.ctx.clearRect(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);\n\n            // Crtaj zvijezde\n            for (let star of this.stars) {\n                this.ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${star.opacity})`;\n                this.ctx.fillRect(\n                    star.x - star.size / 2,\n                    star.y - star.size / 2,\n                    star.size,\n                    star.size\n                );\n\n                // Opciono: glow efekt za rogue zvijezde\n                if (star.isRogue) {\n                    this.ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${star.opacity * 0.5})`;\n                    this.ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n                    this.ctx.beginPath();\n                    this.ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, star.size * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n                    this.ctx.stroke();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        animate() {\n            this.update();\n            this.draw();\n\n            if (this.isRunning) {\n                this.animationId = requestAnimationFrame(() => this.animate());\n            }\n        }\n\n        start() {\n            if (!this.isRunning) {\n                this.isRunning = true;\n                this.animate();\n            }\n        }\n\n        stop() {\n            this.isRunning = false;\n            if (this.animationId) {\n                cancelAnimationFrame(this.animationId);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Javna metoda za dinami”Åko pode+Ēavanje konfiguracije\n        updateConfig(newConfig) {\n            Object.assign(CONFIG, newConfig);\n            this.generateStars();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ========== INICIJALIZACIJA JAVASCRIPT-A ==========\n\n    // Inicijaliziraj nakon +Ēto je DOM u”Åitan\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {\n        window.starsAnimation = new StarsAnimation();\n    });\n\n    // Ako je DOM ve”ń u”Åitan (npr. u async skripti)\n    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {\n            if (!window.starsAnimation) {\n                window.starsAnimation = new StarsAnimation();\n            }\n        });\n    } else {\n        window.starsAnimation = new StarsAnimation();\n    }\n\n})();\n```\n\n## Output įŪ÷ Inclusion u `_Layout.cshtml`\n\nTrebam dodati nakon svih ostalih skripti:\n\n```html\n<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"hr\">\n<head>\n    <!-- ... ostatak head ... -->\n</head>\n<body>\n    <!-- ... ostatak body ... -->\n\n    <!-- Zvijezde animacija įŪ÷ trebam biti na kraju -->\n    <script src=\"~/js/stars-animation.js\" asp-append-version=\"true\"></script>\n\n    @RenderSection(\"Scripts\", required: false)\n</body>\n</html>\n```\n\n## Dinami”Åko Pode+Ēavanje Konfiguracije (Opciono)\n\nAko trebam pode+Ēavati konfiguraciju tijekom razvoja, mogu u console-u:\n\n```javascript\n// U konsoli preglednika:\nwindow.starsAnimation.updateConfig({\n    STAR_COUNT: 500,      // Pove”ńaj broj zvijezda\n    MAX_SPEED: 5,         // Pove”ńaj maksimalnu brzinu\n    ROGUE_STAR_COUNT: 10  // Pove”ńaj broj roguezvijezda\n});\n```\n\n## CSS (Opciono įŪ÷ ako trebam dodatne stilove)\n\nAko je potreban `wwwroot/css/stars.css`:\n\n```css\n/* Stars Animation Styles */\n\n#stars-canvas {\n    background: 1;\n    }\n    100% {\n        opacity: 0.5;\n    }\n}\n\n/* Opciono: ako trebam animirati background */\nbody {\n    transition: background 0.3s ease;\n}\n```\n\n## Karakteristike\n\n1. įØ∙ **300+ zvijezda** įŪ÷ Inicijalno 300, mogu se dinami”Åki mijenjati\n2. įØ∙ **Dinami”Åka brzina** įŪ÷ Skalira se s pozicijom mi+Ēa (0.5-3 px/frame)\n3. įØ∙ **Logika brzine** įŪ÷ Mi+Ē u sredini = sporije, mi+Ē na rubovima = br+┐e\n4. įØ∙ **Rogue zvijezde** įŪ÷ 7 zvijezda (5-10) koje ne prate mi+Ē\n5. įØ∙ **Glatko skaliranje** įŪ÷ Koristi EASE_FACTOR za smooth transitions\n6. įØ∙ **Regeneracija** įŪ÷ FPS\n9. įØ∙ **Responsive** įŪ÷ Skalira se s veli”Åinom prozora\n10. įØ∙ **Zvijezde animacija je vidljiva na svim stranicama** (z-index: -1)\n\n## Performanse\n\n- Canvas umjesto div-ova: **10x        const parts = dateStr.split('.');\n                    if (parts.length !== 3) return null;\n                    \n                    const day = parseInt(parts[0]);\n                    const month = parseInt(parts[1]);\n                    const year = parseInt(parts[2]);\n                    \n                    return new Date(year, month - 1, day);\n                } else {\n                    // MM/dd/yyyy format\n                    const parts = dateStr.split('/');\n                    if (parts.length !== 3) return null;\n                    \n                    const month = 0);\n                        $combinedInput.val(dateObj.toISOString());\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            \n            $dateInput.on(\"change\", [];\nlet mouse = { x: 0, y: 0 };\nlet rogueIndices = new Set();\n\nfunction initStars() {\n    canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.id = 'stars-canvas';\n    canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n    canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n    \n    canvas.style.cssText = `\n        position: fixed;\n        top: 0;\n        left: 0;\n        z-index: -1;\n        pointer-events: none;\n    `;\n    \n    document.body.insertBefore(canvas, document.body.firstChild);\n    ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    \n    // Kreiraj zvijezde\n    for (let i = 0; i < CONFIG.STAR_COUNT; i++) {\n        stars.push({\n            x: Math.random() * canvas.width,\n            y: Math.random() * canvas.height,\n            speed: calculateSpeed(i),\n            isRogue: i < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT\n        });\n        \n        if (i < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT) {\n            rogueIndices.add(i);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Track mi+Ēu\n    document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        mouse.x = e.clientX;\n        mouse.y = e.clientY;\n    });\n    \n    // Resize event\n    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {\n        canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n        canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n    });\n    \n    animate();\n}\n\nfunction calculateSpeed(index) {\n    if (index < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT) {\n        return CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + Math.random() * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n    }\n    \n    // Za normalne zvijezde: brzina zavisi od mi+Ēa\n    const centerX = canvas.width / 2;\n    const centerY = canvas.height / 2;\n    const distFromCenter = Math.hypot(mouse.x - centerX, mouse.y - centerY);\n    const maxDist = Math.hypot(centerX, centerY);\n    const normalizedDist = Math.min(distFromCenter / maxDist, 1);\n    \n    // +ßto je mi+Ē bli+┐e centru = sporija brzina\n    return CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + (1 - normalizedDist) * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n}\n\nfunction animate() {\n    // O”Åisti canvas\n    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)';\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    \n    // A+┐uriranje i
