star.speed = calculateSpeed(index);\n        }\n        \n        // Izra”Åunaj smjer prema mi+Ēi\n        const dx = mouse.x - star.x;\n        const dy = mouse.y - star.y;\n        const distance = Math.hypot(dx, dy);\n        \n        if (distance > 0) {\n            const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);\n            star.x += Math.cos(angle) * star.speed;\n            star.y += Math.sin(angle) * star.speed;\n        }\n        \n        // Regeneriraj zvijezdu ako je izvan ekrana\n        regenerateOffscreenStar(star);\n        \n        // Iscrtaj zvijezdu\n        ctx.beginPath();\n        ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, CONFIG.STAR_SIZE, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n        ctx.fill();\n    });\n    \n    requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n}\n\nfunction regenerateOffscreenStar(star) {\n    const padding = 10;\n    \n    if (star.x < -padding || star.x > canvas.width + padding ||\n        star.y < -padding || star.y > canvas.height + padding) {\n        \n        // Odlu”Åi gdje ”ńe se pojaviti novi zvijezda\n        if (Math.random() < 0.5) {\n            // X je izvan\n            star.x = Math.random() < 0.5 ? -padding : canvas.width + padding;\n            star.y = Math.random() * canvas.height;\n        } else {\n            // Y je izvan\n            star.x = Math.random() * canvas.width;\n            star.y = Math.random() < 0.5 ? -padding : canvas.height + padding;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// Inicijalizacija kad je DOM spreman\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initStars);\n} else {\n i < CONFIG.STAR_COUNT; i++) {\n        const star = createStarFromEdge(i);\n        stars.push(star);\n\n        if (i < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT) {\n            rogueIndices.add(i);\n            rogueAngle[i] = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2; // Random smjer\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Track mi+Ēu\n    document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n        mouse.x = e.clientX;\n        mouse.y = e.clientY;\n    });\n\n    // Resize event\n    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {\n        canvas.width = window.innerWidth;\n        canvas.height = window.innerHeight;\n    });\n\n    animate();\n}\n\nfunction createStarFromEdge(index) {\n    let x, y;\n    const isRogue = index < CONFIG.ROGUE_STAR_COUNT;\n\n    // Odaberi random rub\n    const edge = Math.floor(Math.random() * 4);\n    if (edge === 0) {\n        // Gornji rub\n        x = Math.random() * canvas.width;\n        y = -10;\n    } else if (edge === 1) {\n        // Donji rub\n        x = Math.random() * canvas.width;\n        y = canvas.height + 10;\n    } else if (edge === 2) {\n        // Lijevi rub\n        x = -10;\n        y = Math.random() * canvas.height;\n    } else {\n        // Desni rub\n        x = canvas.width + 10;\n        y = Math.random() * canvas.height;\n    }\n\n    return {\n        x: x,\n        y: y,\n        speed: isRogue ? (CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + Math.random() * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED)) : CONFIG.MIN_SPEED,\n        isRogue: isRogue,\n        angle: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2 // Za random movement\n    };\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CrtM3r1MTM9DxG7DhJPE3Z__vscode-1779016408136","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

(CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + Math.random() * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED)) : CONFIG.MIN_SPEED,\n        isRogue: isRogue,\n        angle: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2 // Za random movement\n    };\n}\n\nfunction animate() {\n    // O”Åisti canvas\n    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)';\n    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n    // Kontinuirano dodaj nove zvijezde s rubova\n    spawnCounter++;\n    if (spawnCounter % 10 === 0 && stars.length < CONFIG.STAR_COUNT * 1.5) {\n        // Svakih 10 framesa dodaj novu zvijezdu s ruba\n        const newStar = createStarFromEdge(stars.length);\n        stars.push(newStar);\n    }\n\n    // A+┐uriranje i iscrtavanje zvijezda\n    ctx.fillStyle = CONFIG.COLOR;\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < stars.length; i++) {\n        const star = stars[i];\n\n        if (star.isRogue) {\n            // ROGUE ZVIJEZDE: Samo random gibanje, bez ovisnosti o mi+Ēu\n            // Promijeni smjer povremeno\n            if (Math.random() < 0.02) {\n                rogueAngle[i] = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;\n            }\n\n            star.x += Math.cos(rogueAngle[i]) * star.speed;\n            star.y += Math.sin(rogueAngle[i]) * star.speed;\n        } else {\n            // NORMALNE ZVIJEZDE: Gibanje prema mi+Ēu\n            const dx = mouse.x - star.x;\n            const dy = mouse.y - star.y;\n            const distance = Math.hypot(dx, dy);\n\n            if (distance > 0) {\n                const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx);\n                // Brzina zavisi od distance mi+Ēu\n                const distanceFactor = Math.min(distance / 500, 1);\n                const speed = CONFIG.MIN_SPEED + distanceFactor * (CONFIG.MAX_SPEED - CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n                star.x += Math.cos(angle) * speed;\n                star.y += Math.sin(angle) * speed;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Regeneriraj zvijezdu ako je izvan ekrana\n        if (star.x < -20 || star.x > canvas.width + 20 ||\n            star.y < -20 || star.y > canvas.height + 20) {\n            // Zamijeni sa novom zvijezdom s ruba\n            stars[i] = createStarFromEdge(i);\n            if (star.isRogue && rogueAngle[i]) {\n                rogueAngle[i] = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;\n            }\n        } else {\n            // Iscrtaj zvijezdu\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, CONFIG.STAR_SIZE, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n            ctx.fill();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // O”Åisti stare rogue angles ako je array smanjen\n    if (stars.length < Object.keys(rogueAngle).length) {\n        Object.keys(rogueAngle).forEach(key => {\n            if (key >= stars.length) {\n                delete rogueAngle[key];\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_019DQdym56hDV4oPQM6VuL5s__vscode-1779016408146","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

CONFIG.MIN_SPEED);\n                star.x += Math.cos(angle) * speed;\n                star.y += Math.sin(angle) * speed;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Regeneriraj zvijezdu ako je izvan ekrana\n        if (star.x < -20 || star.x > canvas.width + 20 ||\n            star.y < -20 || star.y > canvas.height + 20) {\n            // Zamijeni sa novom zvijezdom s ruba\n            stars[i] = createStarFromEdge(i);\n            if (star.isRogue && rogueAngle[i]) {\n                rogueAngle[i] = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;\n            }\n        } else {\n            // Iscrtaj zvijezdu\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, CONFIG.STAR_SIZE, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n            ctx.fill();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // O”Åisti stare rogue angles ako je array smanjen\n    if (stars.length < Object.keys(rogueAngle).length) {\n        Object.keys(rogueAngle).forEach(key => {\n            if (key >= stars.length) {\n                delete rogueAngle[key];\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    requestAnimationFrame(animate);\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_vrtx_01QrbXx4K6iDFHnVJjtFiumR__vscode-1779112000546","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

{"timestamp":"2026-05-20T21:21:57.524Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"0e4cae12-9c1f-4ace-80cf-79797cebe10f","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6a77abf5eb406318942f42fee0e4b058\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\0e4cae12-9c1f-4ace-80cf-79797cebe10f.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\.github\\skills\\lab4-testing-skill\\SKILL.md","content":"---\ndescription: \"Testiranje Lab-4 projekta - CRUD operacije, validacija, autocomplete, datumska kontrola\"\napplyTo:\n  - \"**/Controllers/*Controller.cs\"\n  - \"**/Services/*Repository.cs\"\n  - \"**/Models/*.cs\"\n---\n\n# Lab 4 - Strategija Testiranja\n\nOvaj skill pru+┐aja smjernice za testiranje Lab 4 projekta. Prema zahtjevima vje+┐be trebate testirati:\n\nįØ∙ **CRUD operacije** - Create, Read, Update, Delete  \nįØ∙ **Validacija** - client-side + server-side  \nįØ∙ **Autocomplete dropdown** - AJAX pretraga  \nįØ∙ **Soft delete** - DeletedAt polje umjesto fizi”Åkog brisanja  \nįØ∙ **Datumska kontrola** - format ovisno o kulturi (hr/en)  \nįØ∙ **JavaScript animacije** - napredno kori+Ētenje JavaScripta  \n\n---\n\n## +ßto Testirati - Test Strategija\n\n### 1. **CRUD Operacije**\n\n| Operacija | Test Scenarij | O”Åekivani Rezultat |\n|-----------|--------------|-------------------|\n| **Create** | Kreiraj novu entitetu s valjanim podacima | Entitet se pojavljuje u bazi |\n| | Kreiraj s nevaljanim podacima | Validacijska gre+Ēka, bez spremanja |\n| | Kreiraj s praznom obaveznom poljem | Server validacija odbija |\n| **Read** | U”Åitaj listu entiteta | Sve entitete (gdje je DeletedAt = null) |\n| | U”Åitaj detalje jedne entitete | Prikazane sve informacije |\n| **Update** | A+┐uriraj postoje”ńu entitetu | Promjene se spravljaju u bazu |\n| | A+┐uriraj s nevaljanim podacima | Validacijska gre+Ēka |\n| **Delete** | Obri+Ēi entitetu | DeletedAt se postavlja (soft delete) |\n| | Obrisana entiteta ne pojavljuje se u listama | Filter na DeletedAt = null radi |\n\n### 2. **Validacija**\n\n- **Server-side:** Model.IsValid u controlleru\n- **Client-side:** HTML5 atributi + jQuery validacija\n- **Testiranje:** POST zahtjev s nevaljanim podacima mora vratiti 400 ili ponovno prikazati view\n\n### 3. **Autocomplete Dropdown**\n\n- Endpoint koji vra”ńa JSON rezultate pretrage\n- AJAX poziv s parametrom `query`\n- Vra”ńeni rezultati formatiraju se u dropdownu\n\n### 4. **Soft Delete**\n\n```csharp\n// Umjesto brisanja, postavi DeletedAt\nentity.DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\nawait _dbContext.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n// Kod ”Åitanja filtrira obrisane\nvar items = await _dbContext.Set<MyEntity>()\n    .Where(x => x.DeletedAt == null)\n    .ToListAsync();\n```\n\n---\n\n## Primjer: Test CRUD Operacije za Book Entitet\n\n### Preduvjet\n\nTrebate xUnit + testni DbContext s InMemory bazom podataka.\n\n### Instalacija\n\n```powershell\ncd c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-4\n\n# Dodaj test pakete (ako nedostaju)\ndotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory\ndotnet add package xunit\ndotnet add package xunit.runner.visualstudio\n```\n\n---\n\n## Test Primjer - BookRepository CRUD Test\n\nKreirajte datoteku `Tests/BookRepositoryTests.cs`:\n\n```csharp\nusing Xunit;\nusing Lab4.Models;\nusing Lab4.Services;\nusing Lab4.Data;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace Lab4.Tests\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Testira sve CRUD operacije za Books entitet\n    /// </summary>\n    public class BookRepositoryTests\n    {\n        // Metoda koja kreira testni DbContext s InMemory bazom\n        private ApplicationDbContext GetInMemoryDbContext()\n        {\n            var options = new DbContextOptionsBuilder<ApplicationDbContext>()\n                .UseInMemoryDatabase(Guid.NewGuid().ToString())  // Jedinstvena baza za svaki test\n                .Options;\n\n            var context = new ApplicationDbContext(options);\n            context.Database.EnsureCreated();\n            return context;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Kreiraj novu knji+┐u i provjeri da se pojavljuje u bazi\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator dodaje novu knji+┐u\n        /// 1. Kreira novu Book entitetu s valjanim podacima\n        /// 2. Sprema ju u bazu kroz repository\n        /// 3. Provjerava da se knji+┐u mo+┐e u”Åitati po ID-u\n        /// 4. Provjerava da su svi podaci to”Åni\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task CreateBook_WithValidData_ShouldSaveToDatabase()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE - Pripremite testni scenarij\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            var newBook = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"Gospodar Prstenova\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0547928227\",\n                PublicationDate = new DateTime(1954, 7, 29),\n                Pages = 569,\n                AuthorId = 1,\n                PublisherId = 1\n            };\n\n            // ACT - Izvedite akciju koju testzirate\n            await repository.CreateAsync(newBook);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjerite rezultat\n            var savedBook = await context.Books\n                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(b => b.Title == \"Gospodar Prstenova\");\n\n            Assert.NotNull(savedBook);\n            Assert.Equal(\"978-0547928227\", savedBook.Isbn);\n            Assert.Equal(569, savedBook.Pages);\n            Assert.Null(savedBook.DeletedAt);  // Ne smije biti obrisana\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: A+┐uriraj postoje”ńu knji+┐u i provjeri da se promjene spravljaju\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator mijenja broj stranica knji+┐u\n        /// 1. U”Åita postoje”ńu knji+┐u iz baze\n        /// 2. Mijenja Pages svojstvo\n        /// 3. Sprema promjene\n        /// 4. Provjerava da se promjena vidi u bazi\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task UpdateBook_WithNewPageCount_ShouldUpdateDatabase()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            // Dodaj test knji+┐u\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"Hobbit\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0547928186\",\n                Pages = 310,\n                PublicationDate = new DateTime(1937, 9, 21)\n            };\n            context.Books.Add(book);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            var bookId = book.Id;\n\n            // ACT - A+┐uriraj broj stranica\n            var bookToUpdate = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            bookToUpdate.Pages = 320;  // Promijenjena vrijednost\n            context.Books.Update(bookToUpdate);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjeri da se promjena vidi\n            var updatedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            Assert.Equal(320, updatedBook.Pages);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Obri+Ēi knji+┐u (soft delete) i provjeri da DeletedAt bude postavljen\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator bri+Ēe knji+┐u iz kataloga\n        /// 1. U”Åita knji+┐u iz baze\n        /// 2. Postavi DeletedAt na trenutno vrijeme\n        /// 3. Sprema promjene\n        /// 4. Provjerava da obrisana knji+┐u ne pojavljuje se u listama\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task DeleteBook_SoftDelete_ShouldSetDeletedAtNotNull()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            // Dodaj test knji+┐u\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"1984\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0451524935\",\n                Pages = 328\n            };\n            context.Books.Add(book);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            var bookId = book.Id;\n\n            // ACT - Soft delete (postavi DeletedAt)\n            var bookToDelete = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            bookToDelete.DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\n            context.Books.Update(bookToDelete);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjeri da se obrisana knji+┐u ne pojavljuje\n            var activeBooks = await context.Books\n                .Where(b => b.DeletedAt == null)\n                .ToListAsync();\n\n            Assert.DoesNotContain(activeBooks, b => b.Id == bookId);\n\n            // Provjeri da DeletedAt nije null\n            var deletedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            Assert.NotNull(deletedBook.DeletedAt);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Validacija obaveznog polja (Title)\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Korisnik poku+Ēava kreiranu knji+┐u bez naslova\n        /// 1. Kreira entitetu bez Title svojstva\n        /// 2. Validacija bi trebala detektirati gre+Ēku\n        /// 3. Podaci se ne spravljaju u bazu\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task CreateBook_WithoutTitle_ShouldFailValidation()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = null,  // Nedostaje obavezno polje\n                Isbn = \"978-0451524935\",\n                Pages = 328\n            };\n\n            // ACT & ASSERT - Validation ”ńe biti provjeravana na model level\n            var validationContext = new System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationContext(book);\n            var results = new List<System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationResult>();\n            bool isValid = System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Validator.TryValidateObject(book, validationContext, results, true);\n\n            Assert.False(isValid);\n            Assert.NotEmpty(results);\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Kako Pokrenuti Testove\n\n### 1. **Instalacija Test Framework-a** (ako nedostaje)\n\n```powershell\ncd c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-4\n\n# xUnit je obi”Åno ve”ń instaliran\ndotnet add package xunit\ndotnet add package xunit.runner.visualstudio\ndotnet add package Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory\n```\n\n### 2. **Pokretanje Testova iz Terminala**\n\n```powershell\ncd c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-4\n\n# Pokreni sve testove\ndotnet test\n\n# Pokreni samo odre”┼eni test\ndotnet test --filter \"BookRepositoryTests\"\n\n# Pokreni s verbozim outputom\ndotnet test -v d\n```\n\n### 3. **Pokretanje Testova iz VS Codea**\n\n- Otvori **Test Explorer** (`Ctrl+Shift+@` ili preko Command Palette)\n- Desni klik na test įµÕ **Run Test**\n- Ili kliknite **Run All** za sve testove\n\n---\n\n## +ßto Testira Gornji Primjer?\n\n| Test | +ßto Provjerava | Razlog |\n|------|----------------|--------|\n| `CreateBook_WithValidData` | CRUD Create operacija | Mo+┐e li se novaJest knji+┐u sprema u bazu? |\n| `UpdateBook_WithNewPageCount` | CRUD Update operacija | Mo+┐e li se postoje”ńa knji+┐u a+┐urirati? |\n| `DeleteBook_SoftDelete` | Soft Delete (DeletedAt) | Je li DeletedAt postavljen, a knji+┐u logi”Åki obrisana? |\n| `CreateBook_WithoutTitle` | Server-side Validacija | Sprje”Åava li validacija unos nevaljanog Title-a? |\n\n---\n\n## Dodatni Test Scenariji (Napredni)\n\n### Test Autocomplete Endpointa\n\n```csharp\n[Fact]\npublic async Task SearchBooks_WithQuery_ShouldReturnFilteredResults()\n{\n    // ARRANGE\n    var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n    context.Books.Add(new Book { Title = \"Hobbit\" });\n    context.Books.Add(new Book { Title = \"1984\" });\n    context.Books.Add(new Book { Title = \"Hobbit Returns\" });\n    await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n    // ACT - Pretraga Books gdje Title sadr+┐i \"Hobbit\"\n    var results = context.Books\n        .Where(b => b.Title.Contains(\"Hobbit\") && b.DeletedAt == null)\n        .Take(10)\n        .ToList();\n\n    // ASSERT\n    Assert.Equal(2, results.Count);\n    Assert.All(results, b => Assert.Contains(\"Hobbit\", b.Title));\n}\n```\n\n### Test Validacije Datumske Kontrole\n\n```csharp\n[Theory]\n[InlineData(\"2024-01-01\")]\n[InlineData(\"1900-01-01\")]\n[InlineData(\"2099-12-31\")]\npublic void PublicationDate_WithValidDates_ShouldParse(string dateString)\n{\n    // Test da parser podr+┐ava razli”Åite datumske formate\n    var parsed = DateTime.Parse(dateString);\n    Assert.NotEqual(default, parsed);\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Checklist - +ßto Testirati u Lab 4\n\n- [ ] Kreiraj novu entitetu (Create)\n- [ ] U”Åitaj listu entiteta (Read)\n- [ ] A+┐uriraj entitetu (Update)\n- [ ] Obri+Ēi entitetu s soft delete (Delete)\n- [ ] Validacija obaveznog polja (Server-side)\n- [ ] Autocomplete pretraga vra”ńa filtrirane rezultate\n- [ ] DeletedAt filter - obrisane ne pojavljuju se\n- [ ] Datumska kontrola - format ovisno o kulturi\n- [ ] AJAX dropdown - asinkrona pretraga radi\n\n---\n\n## Savjet: Testirajte Prvo Jedno Entitete Potpuno\n\nBolje je imati 5 dobrih testova za jedan entitet nego 20 lo+Ēih testova za sve. {"timestamp":"2026-05-20T21:31:43.561Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"0e4cae12-9c1f-4ace-80cf-79797cebe10f","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\6a77abf5eb406318942f42fee0e4b058\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\0e4cae12-9c1f-4ace-80cf-79797cebe10f.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET\\lab-4\\Tests\\BookRepositoryTests.cs","content":"using Xunit;\nusing Lab4.Models;\nusing Lab4.Services;\nusing Lab4.Data;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace Lab4.Tests\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Testira sve CRUD operacije za Books entitet\n    /// Primjer: Za ostale entitete (Author, Genre, Publisher, Review) kopiraj ovaj pattern\n    /// </summary>\n    public class BookRepositoryTests\n    {\n        // Metoda koja kreira testni DbContext s InMemory bazom\n        private ApplicationDbContext GetInMemoryDbContext()\n        {\n            var options = new DbContextOptionsBuilder<ApplicationDbContext>()\n                .UseInMemoryDatabase(Guid.NewGuid().ToString())  // Jedinstvena baza za svaki test\n                .Options;\n\n            var context = new ApplicationDbContext(options);\n            context.Database.EnsureCreated();\n            return context;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Kreiraj novu knji+┐u i provjeri da se pojavljuje u bazi\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator dodaje novu knji+┐u\n        /// 1. Kreira novu Book entitetu s valjanim podacima\n        /// 2. Sprema ju u bazu kroz repository\n        /// 3. Provjerava da se knji+┐u mo+┐e u”Åitati po ID-u\n        /// 4. Provjerava da su svi podaci to”Åni\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task CreateBook_WithValidData_ShouldSaveToDatabase()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE - Pripremite testni scenarij\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            var newBook = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"Gospodar Prstenova\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0547928227\",\n                PublicationDate = new DateTime(1954, 7, 29),\n                Pages = 569,\n                AuthorId = 1,\n                PublisherId = 1\n            };\n\n            // ACT - Izvedite akciju koju testirate\n            await repository.CreateAsync(newBook);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjerite rezultat\n            var savedBook = await context.Books\n                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(b => b.Title == \"Gospodar Prstenova\");\n\n            Assert.NotNull(savedBook);\n            Assert.Equal(\"978-0547928227\", savedBook.Isbn);\n            Assert.Equal(569, savedBook.Pages);\n            Assert.Null(savedBook.DeletedAt);  // Ne smije biti obrisana\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: A+┐uriraj postoje”ńu knji+┐u i provjeri da se promjene spravljaju\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator mijenja broj stranica knji+┐u\n        /// 1. U”Åita postoje”ńu knji+┐u iz baze\n        /// 2. Mijenja Pages svojstvo\n        /// 3. Sprema promjene\n        /// 4. Provjerava da se promjena vidi u bazi\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task UpdateBook_WithNewPageCount_ShouldUpdateDatabase()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            // Dodaj test knji+┐u\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"Hobbit\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0547928186\",\n                Pages = 310,\n                PublicationDate = new DateTime(1937, 9, 21)\n            };\n            context.Books.Add(book);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            var bookId = book.Id;\n\n            // ACT - A+┐uriraj broj stranica\n            var bookToUpdate = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            bookToUpdate.Pages = 320;  // Promijenjena vrijednost\n            context.Books.Update(bookToUpdate);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjeri da se promjena vidi\n            var updatedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            Assert.Equal(320, updatedBook.Pages);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Obri+Ēi knji+┐u (soft delete) i provjeri da DeletedAt bude postavljen\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Administrator bri+Ēe knji+┐u iz kataloga\n        /// 1. U”Åita knji+┐u iz baze\n        /// 2. Postavi DeletedAt na trenutno vrijeme\n        /// 3. Sprema promjene\n        /// 4. Provjerava da obrisana knji+┐u ne pojavljuje se u listama\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task DeleteBook_SoftDelete_ShouldSetDeletedAtNotNull()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var repository = new BookRepository(context);\n\n            // Dodaj test knji+┐u\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = \"1984\",\n                Isbn = \"978-0451524935\",\n                Pages = 328\n            };\n            context.Books.Add(book);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            var bookId = book.Id;\n\n            // ACT - Soft delete (postavi DeletedAt)\n            var bookToDelete = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            bookToDelete.DeletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;\n            context.Books.Update(bookToDelete);\n            await context.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n            // ASSERT - Provjeri da se obrisana knji+┐u ne pojavljuje\n            var activeBooks = await context.Books\n                .Where(b => b.DeletedAt == null)\n                .ToListAsync();\n\n            Assert.DoesNotContain(activeBooks, b => b.Id == bookId);\n\n            // Provjeri da DeletedAt nije null\n            var deletedBook = await context.Books.FindAsync(bookId);\n            Assert.NotNull(deletedBook.DeletedAt);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Test: Validacija obaveznog polja (Title)\n        /// \n        /// Scenarij: Korisnik poku+Ēava kreiranu knji+┐u bez naslova\n        /// 1. Kreira entitetu bez Title svojstva\n        /// 2. Validacija bi trebala detektirati gre+Ēku\n        /// 3. Podaci se ne spravljaju u bazu\n        /// </summary>\n        [Fact]\n        public async Task CreateBook_WithoutTitle_ShouldFailValidation()\n        {\n            // ARRANGE\n            var context = GetInMemoryDbContext();\n            var book = new Book\n            {\n                Title = null,  // Nedostaje obavezno polje\n                Isbn = \"978-0451524935\",\n                Pages = 328\n            };\n\n            // ACT & ASSERT - Validation ”ńe biti provjeravana na model level\n            var validationContext = new System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationContext(book);\n            var results = new List<System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationResult>();\n            bool isValid = System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Validator.TryValidateObject(book, validationContext, results, true);\n\n            Assert.False(isValid);\n            Assert.NotEmpty(results);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01SRVjYeL1v4oqeLw4V293S6__vscode-1779308363847","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}
